handoff_note: Requirements 1-3 are implemented and merged. Requirement 4 (autocomplete facility/source separation) requirements, design, and tasks are complete and auto-approved (2026-06-05). Design validated empirically (config-merge confirmed; AC 6 test must use a synchronous stub sublanguage, NOT async codeLanguages: languages). Review correction (2026-06-09): AC 4.5 reworded — the old 'remove the shared facility and both features die' claim was false under config-merge (emoji also calls autocompletion(), so the facility stays installed); the real guarantee is AC 4.2 (mention works without emoji). Design traceability and the AC 4.2/4.4 test notes (EditorState-backed context for emoji; fake-timers for the debounced mention source) were updated to match. Ready for implementation: tasks 4.1 (production refactor + export emojiCompletionSource) then 4.2 (regression tests). Run /kiro-impl comment-mention.
